name: Delivery, Not Storage: Cue-Anchored Working Memory as a Harness Property for Coding Agents
summary: arXiv:2607.20972v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Coding agents ship with one kind of memory: documents. Instruction files, plan artifacts, and auto-written memory directories are deliberately author...
description: arXiv:2607.20972v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Coding agents ship with one kind of memory: documents. Instruction files, plan artifacts, and auto-written memory directories are deliberately authored and deliberately retrieved: the agent must choose to write them and choose to read them back. Human expertise runs on a second tier that never gets written down: situationally-bound operational fac...
author: Swapnanil Saha
